observations.text: PRINCIPAL_NAME VARCHAR(100) < users.email VARCHAR(255) — echec d'insertion de session au login
observations.correction_prompt: File: backend/src/main/resources/db/migration/V008__create_spring_session_tables.sql, line 12. Replace: PRINCIPAL_NAME VARCHAR(100). With: PRINCIPAL_NAME VARCHAR(255). Verify: users.email is VARCHAR(255) in V001.

observations.text: Nommage UPPER_CASE inconsistant avec les 7 migrations precedentes en snake_case
observations.correction_prompt: Replace all UPPER_CASE identifiers with lowercase. Update application.yml table-name accordingly.

observations.text: Attribut Secure absent du cookie de session dans application.yml
observations.correction_prompt: File: backend/src/main/resources/application.yml, after same-site: lax. Add: secure: true.

files.note: Schema Spring Session correct, PRINCIPAL_NAME(100) < email(255) risque erreur login

observations.text: spring-boot-starter-security actif sans SecurityConfig — auto-config non maitrise
observations.correction_prompt: Create SecurityConfig.java with SecurityFilterChain that explicitly configures access. Do not rely on auto-config defaults.

observations.text: spring-security-test ajoute sans test validant le comportement 401 post-activation
observations.correction_prompt: Create SecurityDefaultsTest.java verifying endpoints return 401 without credentials.

observations.text: Reference D-06 non tracable dans le repo
observations.correction_prompt: Replace D-06 reference with descriptive text.

files.note: Dependances BOM correctes, activation Security sans config est bloquant

observations.text: Attribut secure manquant sur le cookie SESSION
observations.correction_prompt: File: backend/src/main/resources/application.yml, after same-site: lax. Add: secure: true.

observations.text: Credentials base de donnees en clair sans separation dev/prod
observations.correction_prompt: Replace with env var references: ${DB_URL:jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/prosperity}, ${DB_USERNAME:prosperity}, ${DB_PASSWORD:prosperity}.

observations.text: table-name SPRING_SESSION en majuscules inconsistant avec convention snake_case
observations.correction_prompt: Replace table-name: SPRING_SESSION with table-name: spring_session and update V008 migration.

observations.text: Timeout de session 30m non configurable via variable d'environnement
observations.correction_prompt: Replace timeout: 30m with timeout: ${SESSION_TIMEOUT:30m}.

files.note: Config session JDBC coherente avec Flyway, cookie non secure et credentials en clair bloquants

observations.text: setup() envoie SetupRequest sans validation cote client
observations.correction_prompt: Validation is the caller's responsibility (form validators). Add catchError mapping to typed error.

observations.text: logout() ne gere pas les erreurs HTTP — etat signal potentiellement incoherent
observations.correction_prompt: File: frontend/src/app/auth/auth.service.ts, lines 59-63. Add catchError that forces currentUser.set(null) even on error, then rethrows.

observations.text: authGuard declenche checkSession() HTTP a chaque navigation sans consulter le signal
observations.correction_prompt: In auth.guard.ts, check isAuthenticated() before calling checkSession().

observations.text: clearUser() methode publique exposant mutation interne du signal
observations.correction_prompt: Add JSDoc @internal comment or replace with logout() call from interceptor.

observations.text: Aucun test pour logout() en cas d'erreur serveur
observations.correction_prompt: Add test logout_clears_user_even_on_server_error in auth.service.spec.ts.

files.note: Service auth Angular 21 solide en Signals, logout sans catchError et guard sans cache bloquants

observations.text: noAdminGuard ne gere pas l'erreur HTTP de checkStatus() — peut bloquer la navigation
observations.correction_prompt: File: frontend/src/app/auth/auth.guard.ts. Add catchError to noAdminGuard that redirects to /login on error. Add of and catchError to rxjs import.

observations.text: Cas d'erreur reseau de noAdminGuard absent du spec
observations.correction_prompt: Add test redirects_to_login_when_status_endpoint_errors in auth.guard.spec.ts.

observations.text: Nom noAdminGuard ambigu — ne reflete pas son role de protection du setup wizard
observations.correction_prompt: Rename noAdminGuard to setupGuard in auth.guard.ts and auth.guard.spec.ts.

observations.text: authGuard et unauthenticatedGuard ignorent le signal currentUser — appel HTTP a chaque navigation
observations.correction_prompt: Check isAuthenticated() before calling checkSession() in authGuard and unauthenticatedGuard.

files.note: Guards fonctionnels solides, checkStatus sans catchError peut bloquer navigation setup

observations.text: Aucun fichier spec pour auth.interceptor.ts — logique de redirection 401 non testee
observations.correction_prompt: Create frontend/src/app/auth/auth.interceptor.spec.ts. Test: 401 on /api/data navigates to /login; 401 on /api/auth/me does NOT navigate; 500 does NOT navigate.

observations.text: Parametre error non type et navigate fire-and-forget
observations.correction_prompt: Type error as HttpErrorResponse. Merge HttpInterceptorFn import.

observations.text: Liste des URLs exclues codee en dur, fragile et non extensible
observations.correction_prompt: Extract AUTH_CHECK_URLS constant and isAuthCheckUrl predicate.

files.note: Intercepteur 401 fonctionnel, absence totale de tests sur chemin critique

observations.text: authInterceptor reagit aux 401 de tous domaines, pas seulement /api/
observations.correction_prompt: File: frontend/src/app/auth/auth.interceptor.ts, lines 12-17. Add condition: req.url.startsWith('/api/') before treating 401.

observations.text: Valeurs XSRF identiques aux defaults Angular, mieux comme constantes nommees
observations.correction_prompt: Either remove withXsrfConfiguration (use Angular defaults) or extract to auth.constants.ts.

files.note: Config HTTP solide alignee Spring Security 7, intercepteur trop large sur scope domaines

observations.text: proxyConfig sans prefixe ./
observations.correction_prompt: File: frontend/angular.json, line 57. Replace proxyConfig: proxy.conf.json With: proxyConfig: ./proxy.conf.json

observations.text: changeOrigin absent dans proxy.conf.json
observations.correction_prompt: File: frontend/proxy.conf.json. Add changeOrigin: true in /api block.

files.note: Proxy dev-server bien configure, deux ameliorations mineures

observations.text: changeOrigin absent — header Host original transmis au backend
observations.correction_prompt: File: frontend/proxy.conf.json. Add changeOrigin: true.

observations.text: Pattern /api sans wildcard — intention ambigue
observations.correction_prompt: Replace /api with /api/** for explicit sub-path matching.

files.note: Proxy dev fonctionnel, changeOrigin et pattern wildcard recommandes

observations.text: clearUser() methode publique sans aucun test

observations.text: Aucun test pour le cas d'erreur de login()
observations.correction_prompt: Add test login_does_not_set_user_on_error flushing 401.

observations.text: check_session assertion partielle — ne verifie pas contenu user()
observations.correction_prompt: Add expect(service.user()?.email).toBe('admin@test.com') after isAuthenticated assertion.

observations.text: Structure AAA absente dans 5/6 tests
observations.correction_prompt: Add // Arrange, // Act, // Assert separators in each test.

observations.text: check_status utilise variable locale d'effet de bord — prefer firstValueFrom
observations.correction_prompt: Replace with firstValueFrom pattern. Add test for setupComplete: false.

observations.text: login test ne verifie pas le corps de la requete HTTP
observations.correction_prompt: Add expect(req.request.body).toEqual({ email: 'admin@test.com', password: 'SecurePass123!' }).

files.note: Nommage et doubles corrects, clearUser non testee, cas erreur login manquants

observations.text: Separation AAA absente dans tous les tests
observations.correction_prompt: Add // Arrange, // Act, // Assert separators.
